headline: Airlines Earnings Should Take Off. The Stocks May Get Left Behind.
summary: Delta Air Lines will kick off second-quarter earnings season for major airlines on July 10, and things have been looking up for the group

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on United Airlines Holdings, Raises Price Target to $171
summary: Citigroup  analyst John Godyn   maintains United Airlines Holdings (NASDAQ:UAL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $132 to $171.

headline: United Is About To Join American Airlines In An Exclusive Bullish Club Linked To Elon Musk
summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. is on the verge of joining an exclusive club that American Airlines Group Inc. entered earlier this month. The connection isn’t travel demand, fuel prices or summer vacation bookings. It’s a bullish chart pattern tied to...
